vocab.meaning: một lòng biết ơn sâu sắc
vocab.example: Receiving such a high-end watch from my parents filled me with a profound sense of gratitude for their unwavering support.
I was gifted a vintage mechanical watch that I consider a timeless masterpiece of engineering and design.

vocab.meaning: trân trọng tình cảm (đằng sau món quà)
vocab.example: Even though the watch was quite inexpensive, I cherish the sentiment behind it as it was a gift from my younger brother.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch đi kèm tính tiện dụng
vocab.example: The smartwatch I got for my birthday perfectly combines functional elegance with modern health-tracking technology.

vocab.meaning: một nghĩa cử hào hiệp/cao đẹp
vocab.example: It was truly a generous gesture when my boss presented me with a luxury watch upon my retirement.
